title: SQLite to prose-files migration tool for v1 to v6 transition
purpose: Migrates legacy SQLite database entries into structured prose files, handling both initial migration and relative path conversion for cross-platform compatibility.
module_context: Exports two main migration functions: runMigrationFromV1 for v1 to v6 migration and migrateProseFilesToRelative for relative path conversion. Includes helper functions for path resolution and database access.

steps.content: Construct and return the path to the .collab/pseudo directory within the project.
Construct and return the path to the legacy pseudo.db file within the pseudo directory.
Construct and return the path to the prose subdirectory under the pseudo directory.
Construct and return the path to the .migrated flag file.
Construct and return the path to the .migrated-rel flag file.
Construct and return the path to the _orphan subdirectory under the prose directory.
Initialize the migration report with zero counts.
IF the migration flag exists, return the empty report.
IF the legacy database file does not exist, return the empty report.
Open the legacy database in read-only mode.
IF the database does not contain the required tables, return the empty report.
Load all files that have prose from the database.
For each file, load its methods and steps from the database.
IF a method has no steps, skip processing it.
Compute the normalized parameters and body fingerprint for each method.
Construct the prose method object with computed values.
IF no methods or file-level prose exist, skip the file.
Convert the file path to a relative POSIX path.
Write the constructed prose file to the output directory.
Mark the migration as complete by writing the flag file.
Split the input path into segments.
Try each suffix of the path segments to find a matching file in the project.
Return the first matching suffix or null if none found.
Initialize the relative migration report with zero counts.
IF the relative migration flag exists, return the empty report.
IF the prose directory does not exist, create it and write a minimal flag.
Walk the prose directory to collect all JSON files.
For each JSON file, read and validate the prose file content.
IF the file is not schema version 3, skip it.
IF the file path is already relative, skip it.
Convert the absolute file path to a relative POSIX path.
IF conversion fails, attempt to recover the path using suffix matching.
IF recovery fails, move the file to the orphan directory.
Write the updated prose file with the relative path.
IF the file was rewritten, remove the old file.
Mark the migration as complete by writing the relative flag file.
